Container.Name: Tunaar
Container.Overview: Tunaar is a single-container bridge that makes IPTV M3U playlists and a real HDHomeRun appear in Plex (and Emby/Jellyfin) as one HDHomeRun-style Live TV tuner, with a merged XMLTV guide and ffmpeg-remuxed streaming. Host networking is recommended so Plex auto-discovers the tuner (UDP 65001). Dashboard on port 5004.

Config.Name: Dashboard port (bridge only)
Config.Description: Only used if you switch Network away from host.

Config.Name: License public key
Config.Description: Optional: your Ed25519 public key (hex) for license validation.

Config.Name: Buy URL
Config.Description: Optional: checkout link shown on the dashboard.
